comment: Buy-side 'Second Life options near you' surfaced on a normal PDP (MT11 — the layer-not-app twin: the buyer MEETS a recovered unit in the normal buy flow, not a separate Renewed storefront). PRICE is computed live by pricing.resale_value at the offer's grade + local demand (auditable, ties to the sell-side math); grade/distance_km/eta/item_id are seeded facts about each nearby recovered unit. item_id points at the catalog product (used for the thumbnail).
